name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn
N == 3  \* Number of processes

(* State variables *)
state == [p \in 1..N |-> -> idle]
turn == 1

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next action *)
Next == \/ \* Process p attempts to enter critical section
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state[p] = idle
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = trying]
          /\ turn' = p
        \/ \* Process p enters critical section
          /\ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state[p] = trying
          /\ turn = p
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = critical]
        \/ \* Process p exits critical section
          /\ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state[p] = critical
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = idle]
          /\ turn' = p

(* Initial condition *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> -> idle]
        /\ turn = 1

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                /\ forks' = forks
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                /\ forks[i] = -1
                /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N \in Nat
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES num, flag

(* TypeOK ensures num and flag are functions from 1..N to Nat *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in 1..N -> Nat
          /\ flag \in 1..N -> BOOLEAN

(* Initial state: all flag false, all num 0 *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next action: process i chooses a number and sets flag true *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] |-> j \in 1..N /\ flag[j] /\ j # i : j \in 1..N})]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



(* --state variables
*)

(* --initial state
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
      /\ votedFor = None
      /\ state = Follower
*)

(* --next state
Next == \/ /\ state = Follower
        /\ state' = Candidate
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = Self
      \/ /\ state = Candidate
        /\ state' = Leader
      \/ /\ state = Leader
        /\ state' = Leader
*)

(* --specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
*)

(* --type invariant
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
        /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Server
        /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}
*)

name: Simple Key-Value Store

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLE store

Init == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys: store[k] = 0

Next == 
  \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
       /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<>>
  \/ \E k \in Keys:
       /\ store' = store
       /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys: store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY, SeqIndices
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ channel \in Seq

Init ==
    /\ file = Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) \div CHUNK_SIZE |-> SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE+1, Min(i*CHUNK_SIZE, Len(file)))]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 0]
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \notin SeqIndices(sentChunks)
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ retransmitCount' = [j \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> IF j = i THEN retransmitCount[j] + 1 ELSE retransmitCount[j]]
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \in SeqIndices(sentChunks)
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = [j \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> IF j = i THEN retransmitCount[j] + 1 ELSE retransmitCount[j]]
    \/ /\ channel' = <<>>
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>
